=== April 2, 2004 - 930 Club.txt
===================

April 2, 2004
Washington D.C.
9:30 Club

Capture by M&A 

Source:
CDR > EAC > WAV > SoftSound Shorten2.3b > SHN

==========================================================
The show:

Disc One
1 Intro
2 Drifter's Escape
3 Hazel
4 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum
5 Just Like A Woman
6 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)
7 Positively 4th Street
8 Highway 61 Revisited
9 Love Sick
10 If Dogs Run Free

Disc Two
1 Most Likely You Go Your Way
2 Not Dark Yet
3 Honest With Me
4 It Ain't Me, Babe / Summer Days
5 Cat's In The Well
6 Like A Rolling Stone
7 All Along The Watchtower
